queue_item.action: Build an exact-head-sha, all-page workflow-run enumerator that preserves raw pagination evidence before absence classification.
required_evidence: current official workflow-run and pagination contracts
explicit external-execution limit and falsification route

progress.finding: Exact head_sha filtering does not by itself prove complete observation. Every linked page must be retained, page numbers must be contiguous, event filtering must remain absent, and the 1000-result filtered-search ceiling must remain explicit.
progress.verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed locally: exact request construction, Link parsing, complete terminal aggregation, missing-next rejection, and page-gap rejection.

queue_item.handoff: Execute this enumerator with authenticated repository read access for commit e35a5e264d6d4f0535d236c6f0b17f2813efa665, retain each raw page and Link header, then feed the aggregate into workflow-run-observation.mjs.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Append-only team-owned update; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
next_action: Add a credential-safe execution wrapper or GitHub Actions job that persists raw pages and aggregate output, then inspect artifacts only when an exact run is observed.
